title: Foreign Assets Information Now Available in Annual Information Statement (AIS)!
content:
# Foreign Assets Information Now Available in Annual Information Statement (AIS)!

Ek important update hai for all taxpayers! The Income Tax Department has announced that information regarding foreign assets and overseas income is now available in the Annual Information Statement (AIS) on the e-Filing portal. This is a significant move to enhance transparency and help you in filing accurate income tax returns.

This functionality comes into effect following an underlying order by the Central Board of Direct Taxes (CBDT) dated July 8, 2026. The objective is to streamline compliance and strengthen the verification process for foreign assets, especially information received under the Automatic Exchange of Information (AEOI) framework.

Here are the key details you should know:

*   **What's New:** Taxpayers can now view details of their foreign bank accounts, investments, interest income, dividends, and other specified foreign financial income directly in their AIS.
*   **Data Covered:** Currently, information for Calendar Years (CY) 2022, 2023, and 2024 has been made available. Data for CY 2025 is expected to be displayed after it is received from partner jurisdictions around September-October 2026.
*   **How to Access:** You can access this information by logging into your Income Tax e-Filing portal, navigating to the 'AIS' section, then selecting the 'Reports' tab, and finally clicking on 'Foreign Assets Information'.
*   **Important Reminder:** While this facility is a great aid, remember that the information in AIS is facilitative and may not be exhaustive. You are still required to correctly and completely report all foreign assets in Schedule FA and foreign source income in Schedule FSI of your Income Tax Return, irrespective of whether they appear in AIS.
*   **CBDT Order Reference:** This initiative is based on the CBDT Order F.No. 225/73/2025-ITA-II dated July 8, 2026, which authorized the Director General of Income-Tax (Systems) to upload this financial information.

The Income Tax Department is also sending out SMS and email alerts to taxpayers about this new feature, urging them to ensure accurate reporting for Assessment Year 2026-27.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://vertexaisearch.cloud.google.com/grounding-api-redirect/AUZIYQHUm29gtlvDFxIMXq47T5PUBo4owLVYW_n_cxg3mSjkROgHbClX4RWQWokO1ONs3D4rFJpFVH7WdJkej6v8xeTlzJMlULRX0YqKDySZ9ZvucLOuTjvSIABZYIw8_CLKlYRh5P9rCHzQPFLcBPDXfMGKwWYegLEsdAqp8CJJJk15oqyWH_hO_fhCJKKGBuU=)
